title: Spicy Creamy Paella
description: A fusion of Chinese and Spanish flavors with the addition of spicy Peruvian peppers, served with a side of aerated rice.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add diced Peruvian pepper and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Add paella rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add creamy sauce, soy sauce, and 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
Stir-fry aerated rice and add to the wok.
Combine paella rice and aerated rice, and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with diced Peruvian pepper.
